since_last: 51% of 89 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +4.07%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 51% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.01% · BTC -0.37% · Gold +1.62% · Nasdaq100 -0.73%. 51% of 89 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +4.07%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +4.07%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -3.92%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TER is the standout at -9.46%
cards.body: Leaders: NOW +6.94%, DV +6.83%, MGNI +5.95%, PUBM +5.91%, APP +5.84%. Laggards: TER -9.46%, VRT -6.45%, HPE -6.37%, NXPI -5.17%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.76% at $151.84
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.76% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
